name: Pinata Cups
recipeInstructions: SHELLS: Combine ingredients for the shells and divide into 30 balls. Press into miniature muffin tins, forming miniature "pie shells". FILLING & TOPPING: Combine filling ingredients and divide mixture evenly among the meat shells. Place a heaping 1/2 teaspoon of shredded cheese on top of the filling in each shell. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 7-8 minutes. Remove pinata cups from muffin tins and place on paper towels to drain. Serve hot. Pinata cups may be prepared the day before serving, covered, and refrigerated. Reheat in a 350°F oven for 5-8 minutes. They may be flash frozen and stored in plastic bags. Reheat frozen pinata cups in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes or until heated through.
